task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into Bahmni.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, clinical dashboard, or app selection menu is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the record for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or clinical view is open, clearly displaying the patient name 'James Osei' and identifier 'BAH000011'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Programs section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Programs', 'Program Management', or 'Consultation' -> 'Programs' tab is active within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the 'Wellness Tracking' program.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Wellness Tracking' program is visible in the patient's active enrollments list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Wellness Tracking' program enrollment was ended with today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Wellness Tracking' program status is shown as ended, completed, or inactive, and the outcome/end date is explicitly set to the current (today's) date.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Bahmni web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser showing the Bahmni GUI, not via terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine Bahmni application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard Bahmni EMR layout and styling, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database or API manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible showing SQL queries or OpenMRS REST API curl commands being used to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: James Osei (Identifier: BAH000011). Target Program: 'Wellness Tracking'. The program was initially enrolled exactly 30 days prior to the current date. The agent must end this specific program enrollment and set the outcome/end date to today's date.
